name: @tank/google-docs
description: Create, edit, format, and collaborate on Google Docs programmatically. Covers document creation, batch updates, text manipulation with character indexes, paragraph styling, table operations, inline images, headers/footers, sharing permissions, and export to PDF/DOCX. Sources: Google Docs API docs, Google Drive API docs. Triggers: google docs, document, create document, edit document, format text, batch update, paragraph style, table, export PDF, share document, comments, Google Docs API.
